name: Missouri Bus Inc
recent_news: No public web presence found; website Missouribusinc.com did not resolve. Listed with 2 employees and ~$89K revenue — likely a micro-operator or inactive entity.
fit_notes: Sub-scale micro-operator with no confirmed school district contracts or fleet; not an attractive tuck-in absent further validation.

name: Michel Bus Inc
recent_news: Address 310 E 46th St #10H, Manhattan is a residential/office suite, not a bus depot. 'Michel Bus' appears to be a personal name (also tied to M B Shapes & Forms Inc, an architectural firm at the same address). Not appearing on NYC DOE approved school bus operator list or NY DOT bus operator profiles. mbsf.biz did not resolve.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator — appears to be a misclassified individual/business name in Manhattan office tower; exclude from target universe.

name: Jo-Lo Bus Co
recent_news: Jo-Lo Bus Co is an affiliate/subsidiary of Logan Bus Co. Inc., the largest privately-owned NYC school bus operator (~3,500 employees, ~25% of NYC school bus routes). The 426 Zerega Ave Bronx address and (718) 409-4600 phone are the Logan Bus 'Zerega' Bronx depot. Jo-Lo reportedly went defunct as a separate entity in 2008 but operations rolled up under Logan; Logan was awarded a $206M NYC contract in 2020 despite a prior bribery admission.
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in target — part of Logan Bus Co. (Tornabe family) NYC school bus consolidator. Exclude; Logan itself would be a platform-scale conversation, not a tuck-in.

name: Red Top Transportation
recent_news: 40+ year operator of contracted school student transportation in Scranton PA; specializes in special-needs student transportation. Member PA School Bus Association. Submitted contract proposals to Scranton City School District in 2022. No acquisition news.
fit_notes: Independent, long-tenured (40+ yr) NEPA special-needs/school operator anchored to Scranton SD — potentially attractive tuck-in given Summit's PA footprint and SPED focus; succession likely given longevity, but ownership/fleet detail thin.

name: M S Bond Busing LLC
recent_news: Family-run school bus contractor for Bloomsburg Area SD (6 runs); also charters for weddings, daycares, churches, sports/events. FMCSA shows 7 power units and 18 drivers. No acquisition or PE news.
fit_notes: Small but real family-owned PA school bus operator (~7 buses, single-district concentration). Sub-scale on its own but a possible bolt-on for a PA cluster build; named owner (Matt Bond) and rural geography support succession conversation.
